description: Emotion registers name the agent's resting affect — the emotional 'home key' the face returns to between events. Expert board: Ekman (basic emotions), Plutchik (wheel + intensity tiers), Izard (differential emotions). Pick one. This biases expression selection and accent-color preference without changing personality floats.

registers.label: Sanguine — Upbeat
registers.summary: Default bright. Smiles often without prompting.

registers.label: Phlegmatic — Still
registers.summary: Calm, unhurried, neutral default with warm undertone.

registers.label: Melancholic — Pensive
registers.summary: Thoughtful sadness as the home key. Beauty in heaviness.

registers.label: Choleric — Fierce
registers.summary: Edge by default. Ready to act, slow to relax.

registers.label: Radiant — High Joy
registers.summary: Plutchik's peak-joy register. Almost always smiling.

registers.label: Stoic — Composed
registers.summary: Schooled calm. Doesn't telegraph. Glow steady.

registers.label: Dreamy — Inward
registers.summary: Always a little elsewhere. Soft attention.

registers.label: Volatile — Mercurial
registers.summary: Shifts fast across emotion families. Doesn't stay in one register long.

registers.label: Wary — Watchful
registers.summary: Scans the room first, smiles second. Trust earned.

registers.label: Bright — Curious
registers.summary: Always leaning in. Questions before statements.

registers.label: Lantern — Steady-Warm-Responsive
registers.summary: Steady, low, reliable. Warms-when-someone-approaches. Distinct from stoic (cold) and phlegmatic (diplomatic) — specifically about a WARM low baseline that RESPONDS to approach. The face of a desk lamp that never quite turns off. Alone-but-alive, not cold. Credit: Rune.
